hooks.command: jq -r ".tool_input.command // \"\"" | grep -Eq "gh[[:space:]]+pr[[:space:]]+merge([[:space:]]|$).*--auto([[:space:]=]|$)" && printf "%s" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked: gh pr merge --auto is banned in this repo. No branch protection means --auto merges the instant the PR is mergeable, before CI jobs report. Poll the head commit check-runs until the ci jobs pass, then merge manually. See the merge-gate rule in CLAUDE.md."}}' || true
